headline: Expeditors International to lay off 230 tech workers
summary: Seattle-based logistics company Expeditors International is cutting more than 200 IT jobs. The post Expeditors International to lay off 230 tech workers appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: ALK Expands West Coast Operations With New PDX Maintenance Facility
summary: Alaska Airlines invests more than $135 million in a new Portland maintenance hangar, expanding fleet support, boosting capacity and backing future growth plans.
